constraints.layout_style: table rows with inputs in td cells

required_complexity_patterns.notes: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value
Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click
Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root
When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, large, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Required: When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient Reference DOM (Conditional radio reveal): Selecting Yes on sponsorship reveals follow-up textarea Reference DOM (Pattern constrained tel): Phone input has title hint for UK format (pattern attribute omitted so mock fill passes) Reference DOM (Optgroup select): Department select uses optgroup for grouping options Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: readonly-prefill, div-role-textbox, details-accordion, shadow-host, native-select-not-combobox. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: table rows with inputs in td cells. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Conditional radio reveal; Pattern constrained tel; Optgroup select.
